creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
To the submitter can you please confirm that this is still as problem on 8.x?
If so does the following patch fix the issue?
Index: quirk/usb_quirk.c
===================================================================
--- quirk/usb_quirk.c   (revision 227518)
+++ quirk/usb_quirk.c   (working copy)
@@ -286,6 +286,8 @@
       USB_QUIRK(OLYMPUS, C1, 0x0000, 0xffff, UQ_MSC_FORCE_WIRE_BBB,
           UQ_MSC_FORCE_PROTO_SCSI, UQ_MSC_WRONG_CSWSIG),
       USB_QUIRK(OLYMPUS, C700, 0x0000, 0xffff, UQ_MSC_NO_GETMAXLUN),
+       USB_QUIRK(OLYMPUS, FE20, 0x0000, 0xffff, UQ_MSC_FORCE_PROTO_SCSI,
+               UQ_MSC_NO_SYNC_CACHE, UQ_MSC_FORCE_WIRE_BBB),
       USB_QUIRK(ONSPEC, SDS_HOTFIND_D, 0x0000, 0xffff, UQ_MSC_FORCE_WIRE_BBB,
           UQ_MSC_FORCE_PROTO_SCSI, UQ_MSC_NO_GETMAXLUN, UQ_MSC_NO_SYNC_CACHE),
       USB_QUIRK(ONSPEC, CFMS_RW, 0x0000, 0xffff, UQ_MSC_FORCE_PROTO_SCSI),
Index: usbdevs
===================================================================
--- usbdevs     (revision 227518)
+++ usbdevs     (working copy)
@@ -2434,6 +2434,7 @@
 /* Olympus products */
 product OLYMPUS C1             0x0102  C-1 Digital Camera
 product OLYMPUS C700           0x0105  C-700 Ultra Zoom
+product OLYMPUS FE20           0x0109  FE-20

 /* OmniVision Technologies, Inc. products */
 product OMNIVISION OV511       0x0511  OV511 Camera

-- 
Eitan Adler
Ports committer
X11, Bugbusting teams
